subcodes.title: Words spoken at Plaza Hotel in Chicago, 1912-05-04
subcodes.first_line: No progress is possible except through the power of the Holy Spirit.... The foundation of all the religions is one and this foundation is truth.... There is no evil in the world of existence.... It [the world of creation] calls for change and transformation.
subcodes.first_line_orig: جز بقوهء معنوی و امر الهی ترقی ننماید هر یک از مظاهر الهیه در ملت و مملکتی مبعوث شد
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @law of transformation and change, @things are known by their opposites, @oneness; unity of religion, @changing and unchanging parts of religion, @unity; oneness of humanity, @nonexistence of evil; relativity of good and evil
